4-Day Training Split Matrix

An immutable structural training matrix engineered to eliminate gym floor guesswork.

Book via Svetness

Day 1: Upper Push / Pull Priming

Exercise Movement Sets Reps Rest
Barbell Bench Press46 - 8120s
Bent-Over Barbell Rows46 - 8120s
Incline Dumbbell Press310 - 1290s
Lat Pulldowns (Wide Grip)310 - 1290s

Day 2: Lower Anterior Load

Exercise Movement Sets Reps Rest
Barbell Back Squats45150s
Leg Press (Narrow Footing)310 - 1290s
Walking Dumbbell Lunges312 / leg90s
Hanging Leg Raises3Failure60s

Day 3: Upper Hypertrophy Split

Exercise Movement Sets Reps Rest
Seated Cable Rows31290s
Dumbbell Shoulder Press31090s
Incline Dumbbell Flyes31260s
Dual Cable Bicep Curls41560s

Day 4: Lower Posterior Load

Exercise Movement Sets Reps Rest
Conventional Deadlifts35180s
Romanian Deadlifts38 - 1090s
Lying Leg Curls41260s
Standing Calf Raises41560s
